success.accountCreated: Account created successfully. You can now log in.

roomsSection.title: Available Rooms
roomsSection.subtitle: Choose from our selection of comfortable and well-equipped rooms

rooms.singleDesc: Comfortable single room perfect for solo travelers
rooms.doubleDesc: Spacious double room with modern amenities for two guests

info.flexibleText: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before check-in
info.amenitiesText: Complimentary WiFi, breakfast, and parking for all guests
info.supportText: Our team is always available to assist you

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.holidayMsg: Enjoy special discounted rates for bookings during the holiday season.
announcements.diningMsg: We now offer in-room dining service from 7 AM to 10 PM daily.
announcements.maintenanceMsg: Pool will be under maintenance on Dec 20-21. Thank you for your understanding.

footer.rightsEduHotel: © 2025 Edu Hotel Management System - Sabancı University. All rights reserved.

bookingRequest.title: Reservation Request for EDU Hotel
bookingRequest.subtitle: Submit a pre-reservation request for EDU Hotel. Your request will be reviewed and approved by the administration. Final room assignment will be done by the hotel staff.
bookingRequest.step1Description: Please fill in your stay dates and basic information. This is a request form, not an instant booking.
bookingRequest.step2Description: These are example room types available at EDU Hotel. Final room assignment will be made by the hotel administration after your request is approved.
bookingRequest.pageSubtitle: Submit your pre-reservation request. The EDU team will review and confirm.

form.explanationPlaceholder: Please briefly explain the purpose of your stay (especially for education-related reservations).
form.freeAccommodationHint: ✓ If approved, payment will not be requested for this reservation.
form.consent: I confirm that the information provided is correct and I accept the reservation rules.

messages.success: Your reservation request has been submitted. You will be notified after it is reviewed by the administration.
messages.error: There was an error submitting your request. Please try again later.
messages.datesRequired: Please select check-in and check-out dates.

bookingRequest.roomAssignmentInfo: Rooms are assigned by the EDU reception after approval. Users cannot select rooms.
bookingRequest.afterSubmitInfo: After submission, your request will be reviewed by the EDU team. You will receive an email or push notification after review.
bookingRequest.afterSubmitPaymentNote: Payment will be requested only after approval if applicable.

rules.title: Reservation Rules
rules.max30: Reservations allowed up to 30 days ahead
rules.manualApproval: All pre-reservations require manual approval by the EDU team.
rules.confirmationTime: You will receive confirmation after review.

account.title: My Account
account.subtitle: Manage your account settings and personal information

profile.title: Profile Information
profile.tcNote: This field cannot be modified for security reasons.

password.title: Change Password
password.req3: At least one number & one special character

session.title: Session Management
session.subtitle: Sign out to protect your account data.

payment.title: Payment & Confirmation
payment.subtitle: Complete your payment via bank transfer and upload your receipt for verification.
payment.importantNote: Your reservation has been approved. Please complete the payment via bank transfer and upload your receipt to finalize your booking.
payment.paymentRef: Important: Please use your Reservation ID #{{id}} as the payment reference/description.
payment.dragDrop: Drag and drop your receipt here, or
payment.adminReview: After uploading your receipt, the administration will review and confirm your payment. You will receive an email notification once verified.

errors.invalidFormat: Invalid file format. Please upload PDF, JPG, or PNG.
errors.uploadFailed: Failed to upload receipt. Please try again.
